Extract model matrix

Source: R/methods.R
model.matrix.flexybayes.Rd

Extract model matrix

Usage

# S3 method for class 'flexybayes'
model.matrix(object, ...)

Arguments

object

A flexybayes object

...

Additional arguments (ignored)

Value

The fixed effects model matrix
